title: Title
select_users: Please select at least one user
dc_slogan:
👑 Don't need a crown to prove it 
— Our strength is the ultimate mark of royalty
dc_description: We are a dance crew that embodies the spirit of unity, passion, and excellence. We believe that true royalty comes from within, and our strength lies in our dedication to dance and each other. Join us on this journey as we break boundaries and redefine what it means to be a dance crew.
dc_description_short: We are a dance crew that embodies the spirit of unity, passion, and excellence. Join us on this journey as we break boundaries and redefine what it means to be a dance crew.
dc_inquiries: If you have any enquiries, feel free to contact us:

supportUsDescription: Your support helps us a lot in maintaining and improving the app. If you enjoy using Crownless App, please consider supporting us by donating or sharing the app with your friends. Every bit of support counts and helps us continue to provide a great experience for all our users!
faqSubtitle: Find quick answers to common questions about us
privacyPolicy_desc: Crownless ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our app.
termsConditions_desc: Crownless ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to providing a safe and enjoyable experience for all users. These Terms & Conditions outline the rules and guidelines for using our app.
